{{Infobox character
| name = Bloody Thorn
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = returning champion, arena fighter of Truegold rank, Daughter of Dread
| abilities = Empty Palm technique, Ruler technique involving needles, Path of Twin Stars
| affiliations = Twin Star sect
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Bloody Thorn is a celebrated combatant and returning champion who performs in front of large, enthusiastic crowds. In battle, she utilizes a fighting style centered around needles, which she can manipulate to float in the air or rise from the ground to surround her opponents. She is capable of switching between different cores during combat, a tactic used to manage illusions or change her fighting state. Despite her prowess and the protection of thick [[Enforced]] robes, she is capable of being wounded or caught off guard by skilled adversaries. During her engagements, she has been observed fighting alongside a diverse group of individuals across various spiritual ranks and [[Paths]].}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Known as the [[Daughter of Dread]], Bloody Thorn is an experienced [[Truegold]] rank [[arena]] fighter and a returning champion. A member of the [[Twin Star sect]], she trained in the [[Path of Twin Stars]] and possesses the ability to switch cores to utilize different types of [[madra]]. During combat, she employs an earth core to channel yellow earth madra and utilizes [[pure madra]] alongside the [[Empty Palm]] technique. Her specialized combat style also features a [[Ruler technique]] that involves the use of needles as weapons.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] is a returning champion and an experienced [[arena]] fighter of [[Truegold]] rank.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] uses needles as weapons.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] uses [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] uses the [[Empty Palm]] technique.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] can switch cores to use different types of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] uses yellow earth madra.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] uses a [[Ruler technique]] involving needles.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] is a returning champion.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] is known as the [[Daughter of Dread]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] is a member of the [[Twin Star sect]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] trained in the [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloody Thorn]] uses an earth core.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Twin Star Sect]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
